opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: There is a huge, hard lump on the back of my thigh that throbs constantly. I can't sit down at all, and I feel hot and sick.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The lump has blown up over the last couple of days, it's now got a yellow head on it, and today I've started feeling feverish and generally awful.

symptom_narrative.onset: a small tender red bump appeared on the back of the right thigh about 5 days ago
symptom_narrative.duration: 5 days, but it has enlarged very fast over the last 2 days
symptom_narrative.character: started as a little red bump, now a big hard painful red lump; the middle went soft and squishy yesterday and today there's a yellow-white head on it
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe, constant throbbing pain, worst when I move or try to sit
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the back of my right thigh
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, no let-up, worse with any movement
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: sitting down, walking, any pressure on it
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling hot and shivery and generally unwell since this morning; the skin around the lump looks red and feels hot
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get boils and skin infections a lot; I was told I had a golden staph (MRSA) infection a couple of years ago
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't sit down and it hurts to walk, so I've barely been able to do anything today

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a golden staph / MRSA infection about 2 years ago

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; worried because the symptoms are getting worse and there is no one else at home

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: a large red raised lump about the size of a golf ball on the back of the thigh with a distinct yellow-white pointing head in the centre; the surrounding skin looks red
patient is standing for the video call and says he cannot bear to sit because of the pain
feels hot, shivery and generally unwell
